Speaker 0: Today's date is April 9, 2026. We are here for the videotaped deposition of Doctor Bianca Caram.

Speaker 1: This is Cause Number DC-25-13430. Please raise your right hand.

Speaker 2: I do.

Speaker 3: My name is Emily Johnson, and I represent the defendant.

Speaker 3: Would you please state your name for the record.

Speaker 2: Bianca Caram.
